episodes.title: The Cult That Said Humans Don’t Need Food… People Died Trying - The Scareful Story of Breatharianism
episodes.description:
The Belief That Killed Real People: Breatharianism

Some people genuinely believe the human body doesn't need food to survive. Not as a fast. Not as a cleanse. Permanently — sustained by air, sunlight, and what followers call "life force energy."

This is the story of breatharianism: where it came from, who built movements around it, how it spread, and what happened to the people who followed it to the end.

We cover the centuries-old religious tradition that gives this belief its staying power, the California founder who built the first modern institute — and got caught at a 7-Eleven — the Australian woman who took it global and whose followers died while she denied responsibility, and the movement's rebranded, wellness-packaged version that's still operating today.

Real people. Real deaths. And a belief system designed so that nothing could ever prove it wrong.
——
🎙️ Scareful Stories is a true-story storytelling channel. No jump scares. No dramatic music. Just real stories that feel a little off.

New videos every week.
——
